Thu, Mar 12, 2026 · 6:00 PM to 9:00 PM CET

19:30 Second talk - "Bridging Analytics and ML at Energie360: dbt, AI Assistants, and Domain Modeling in Energy" by Magnus Struckmann (Energie360)

talks.description: How analytics engineering bridges the gap between data and software engineering, breaking down silos between the disciplines.

events.raw_text:
Thu, Dec 5, 2024 · 6:45 PM to 10:00 PM CET

19:00 - 19:20 | dbt semantic layer (Charles Verleyen - CEO at Astrafy & Andrea Bombino - Head of Analytics Engineer at Astrafy)
19h30 - 19h50 | Running with Data: How On Scales with dbt (Lewis Osborne - Lead Data Engineer at On)

talks.description: Exploring the concepts of a semantic layer, why it's gaining traction, why it's a foundational pillar for LLMs, with a hands-on demo.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: 19:00 - 19:20 | dbt semantic layer (Charles Verleyen - CEO at Astrafy & Andrea Bombino - Head of Analytics Engineer at Astrafy)
talks.speaker_title: CEO, Astrafy; Head of Analytics Engineering, Astrafy
talks.title: dbt Semantic Layer

talks.description: A case study on how On, a fast-growing sports & lifestyle apparel company, balances excellence and innovation across its tech and data landscape using dbt.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: 19h30 - 19h50 | Running with Data: How On Scales with dbt (Lewis Osborne - Lead Data Engineer at On)
talks.title: Running with Data: How On Scales with dbt

events.agenda: 18h30 Welcome with food & drinks; 19h00 Multi-projects collaboration talk; 19h45 Break; 20h00 Data Vault 2.0 talk; 20h30 Networking & drinks & pizzas.
events.event_description: The 2nd edition of the Switzerland dbt Meetup and first one in Geneva. dbt Meetups are networking events open to all folks working with data.
events.raw_text:
Thu, Feb 1, 2024 · 6:30 PM to 8:30 PM CET

19h00: Multi-projects collaboration with dbt Cloud (Andrea Bombino & David Peitinho - Astrafy)
20h00: Data Vault 2.0 with dbt (Nawfel Bacha & Emmanuel Derepas - Jaeger-Leocultre)

talks.description: Covering the basics of dbt Cloud's multi-projects collaboration features (dependencies.yml, model versioning, data contracts) demoed with the 'jaffle shop' repositories.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: 19h00: Multi-projects collaboration with dbt Cloud (Andrea Bombino & David Peitinho - Astrafy). dbt cloud is gaining a lot of traction due to its accessibility and important new data mesh features
talks.title: Multi-Projects Collaboration with dbt Cloud

talks.description: Concepts of Data Vault 2.0 modelling and a real implementation using dbt and the 'AutomateDV' package at Jaeger-Lecoultre.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: 20h00: Data Vault 2.0 with dbt (Nawfel Bacha & Emmanuel Derepas - Jaeger-Leocultre). Data Vault 2.0 is one of the most advanced data modeling techniques
talks.title: Data Vault 2.0 with dbt

additional_metadata.organizer: Astrafy, enabled by the community team at dbt Labs

events.agenda: 18h30 Welcome with food & drinks; 19h00 Data Mesh with dbt talk; 19h45 Break; 20h00 MLOps lifecycle talk; 20h30 Networking & drinks & pizzas.
events.event_description: The 1st edition of the Lausanne dbt Meetup! dbt Meetups are networking events open to all folks working with data.
events.raw_text:
Thu, Sep 28, 2023 · 6:30 PM to 9:30 PM CEST

19h00: Data Mesh with dbt (Andrea Bombino & David Peitinho - Astrafy)
20h00: "Want to know the MLOps lifecycle of an enterprise grade use case?" (Pelayo Choya Carreter - Richemont)

talks.description: Demystifying the main concepts of data mesh and bringing them to life with dbt using concrete data products from Astrafy, including downstream activation via the dbt semantic layer.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: 19h00: Data Mesh with dbt (Andrea Bombino & David Peitinho - Astrafy). Data Mesh has become a powerful buzzwords and every data practitioner has heard about it.
talks.title: Data Mesh with dbt

talks.description: The end-to-end technical implementation of an enterprise-grade MLOps use case at Richemont, covering data acquisition, model training, serving, and monitoring.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: 20h00: "Want to know the MLOps lifecycle of an enterprise grade use case?" (Pelayo Choya Carreter - Richemont). The speaker will cover end to end the technical implementation of a real world use case
talks.title: Want to Know the MLOps Lifecycle of an Enterprise Grade Use Case?
